products.title: Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Premium Noise Canceling Overhead Headphones with Mic for Phone-Call and Alexa Voice Control, Black
reviews: These headphones are amazing. The noise cancellation is top notch.

Had an issue with the hinge after 6 months, but warranty covered it.
